description: Benchmark tests for branch-manager skill - Git branch and PR management

evals.name: simple-feature-branch-creation
evals.prompt: 创建 feature 分支: module=backend, task_id=TASK-001, description=user-auth

assertions.name: correct_branch_name
assertions.description: Should generate correct branch name format

assertions.name: mentions_branch_mode
assertions.description: Should indicate Branch mode was selected

evals.name: complex-worktree-decision
evals.prompt: 创建分支: module=cross, task_id=TASK-002, description=api-refactor, files=[backend/api.py, frontend/api.ts, shared/types.ts], task_count=5, risk_level=high

assertions.name: selects_worktree_mode
assertions.description: Should select Worktree mode for complex tasks

evals.name: bugfix-branch-naming
evals.prompt: 创建 bugfix 分支: module=mobile, issue=ISSUE-42, description=login-crash

assertions.name: correct_bugfix_format
assertions.description: Should use bugfix prefix in branch name

evals.name: hotfix-branch-naming
evals.prompt: 创建 hotfix 分支: version=v1.2.1, description=security-patch, branch_type=hotfix

assertions.name: correct_hotfix_format
assertions.description: Should use hotfix prefix with version

evals.name: environment-validation
evals.prompt: 在创建分支前验证环境: module=backend

evals.name: forced-branch-mode
evals.prompt: 创建分支: module=backend, task_id=TASK-003, description=test, mode=branch (强制使用 Branch 模式)

assertions.name: respects_mode_override
assertions.description: Should use Branch mode when explicitly specified

evals.name: forced-worktree-mode
evals.prompt: 创建分支: module=backend, task_id=TASK-004, description=simple, mode=worktree (强制使用 Worktree 模式)

assertions.name: respects_worktree_override
assertions.description: Should use Worktree mode when explicitly specified

assertions.name: has_pr_title_format
assertions.description: PR title should follow format: type(scope): description

evals.name: risk-level-detection
evals.prompt: 创建分支: module=backend, task_id=TASK-005, description=api-breaking-change, 风险等级应该为 high

assertions.name: detects_high_risk
assertions.description: Should detect high risk from breaking/api keywords

evals.name: module-identifier-validation
evals.prompt: 列出支持的模块标识符
